J-01.name: Run a backtest from natural language
J-01.note: No-regression smoke under the iter-3 session-open lightweight/lazy-load contract change. Submitted a fresh NL backtest via chat; pipeline generate-strategy + execute-backtest + generate-insights all 200; history Iterations 3->4, new 'Complete' card 'BTC 1h RSI Mean Reversion' with prompt snippet + metrics (-25.74% / 106 trades / DD -37.3% / WR 59%), detail auto-displayed with Equity Curve; API-confirmed new run 09aa56b5 complete, NO heavy keys leaked in the lightweight list entry. Run-append + lightweight-list behavior correct. UT-11 PASS.

J-02.name: Inspect and browse run history
J-02.note: PRIMARY REGRESSION WATCH for the session-open contract change — strong pass. Selecting a run from the now-lightweight history list fires the per-iteration lazy fetch GET /api/sessions/{id}/iterations/{iterationId} and the detail (strategy spec, metrics, Equity Curve, Trade History) populates correctly. A->B->A (115 vs 23 trades, distinct strategy names) showed each run's own data with no stale/cross-run bleed; re-selecting an already-loaded run does NOT re-fetch (in-memory merge cache; write-amplification guard verified at useBacktest.ts hydration seed :569 == save compute :607 == lazy pre-set :1546-1548). F5 reopen auto-loads the previously-selected completed run's full detail with no stuck spinner. INDEPENDENCE RULE (lessons.md iter-0) APPLIED: this green J-02 does NOT prove the eager-load anti-goal resolved — the anti-goal proof is the backend code read + non-vacuous response-shape test (see anti_goal_violations[2]). Evidence: UT-04/UT-05/UT-08. UT-04/05/08 PASS.

J-03.name: Walk-forward validation
J-03.note: No-regression smoke; evaluator visually confirmed the screenshot directly. From a completed run's lazily-loaded detail view, walk-forward rendered: WFE 1.26 badge (green >=0.5), per-window IS/OOS table (#/IS Period/OOS Period/IS Return/OOS Return/IS Sharpe/OOS Sharpe/Trades), Combined OOS Equity Curve chart, OOS aggregates, and Strategy Rating stars. No WF error -> scriptCode (a lazy heavy field) was successfully lazy-loaded before the WF button was reachable, confirming the lazy-load contract does not regress walk-forward. UT-12 PASS.

J-04.name: AI insights
J-04.note: SOFT GAP CLOSED (open since iter-0; iter-2 had an invalid byte-identical-to-J-03 duplicate screenshot). The OOS-aware sub-clause ('suggestions are OOS-aware when walk-forward data exists') now has DEDICATED, DISTINCT, INDEPENDENTLY-INSPECTED evidence. sha256: every J-04 capture is byte-distinct from every J-03 capture (TC-12-j04-insights ada68f7d != TC-14-j03-walkforward 1df318ef; UT-10-j04-oos-insights fb5231ee != UT-12-j03-walkforward 185ced5c). Evaluator opened the pixels: UT-10-j04-oos-insights-zoom.png is the LEFT-panel insights box whose prose explicitly cites 'healthy 1.256 WFE' and 'OOS results remain negative at -7.22% with a -1.02 Sharpe' + 10 ranked suggestion chips — structurally unlike the J-03 right-pane per-window IS/OOS table + Combined OOS curve + rating stars. Corroborated by QA's direct call to the real POST /api/generate-insights with the real walk_forward_result (5/10 suggestions OOS/WFE/robustness-aware). insights_generator.py confirmed NOT in the diff (verification-only). lessons.md iter-2 distinctness rule satisfied. UT-10 PASS.

J-05.name: Reference data loads
J-05.note: No-regression smoke (closed iter-2, confirmed not reopened — BacktestConfigBar.tsx confirmed NOT in the iter-3 diff). Symbol input enabled with a 26-option datalist (BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, BNB/USDT, SOL/USDT, XRP/USDT, ...) sourced from GET /api/symbols; Timeframe dropdown enabled (1 Minute ... 1 Day, incl. '1 Hour') sourced from GET /api/timeframes. Controls populate from the endpoints, not hardcoded. UT-13 PASS.

J-06.name: Warm-cache re-run works end-to-end
J-06.note: No-regression smoke under the lazy-load contract. The goal.md J-06 literal acceptance ('the second run completes and renders metrics, an equity curve, and a trades table without error, and the run appears in history') is satisfied: the warm-cache re-run completed without error and appended to history (Iterations 4->5, run 46a01210) under the new lightweight/lazy-load session-open path — no run-creation/persistence regression. DOCUMENTED CAVEAT (P3, not a blocker, orthogonal to this iter's change): the same NL prompt produced different generated strategy code (LLM non-determinism), so an exact-metric match is not browser-observable via NL re-prompt — this is expected LLM behavior, NOT the backtest engine's determinism guarantee. Engine-level determinism (anti-goal #4: identical strategy code + warm data -> identical output) is intact and unit-proven: evaluator re-ran test_determinism.py 6/6 and test_lookahead.py 6/6; iter-1/iter-2 verified byte-identical warm-cache determinism with identical code; the iter-3 diff does not touch the backtest/cache/determinism layers (only session_routes.py backend-side). UT-14 PASS (documented caveat).

anti_goal_violations.anti_goal: OHLCV market data MUST be cached as a single Parquet file per (symbol, timeframe) — NOT one CSV or file per calendar day — and MUST NOT be re-fetched from Binance when a covering local cache exists.
anti_goal_violations.evidence: RESOLVED in goal-money-billions-iter-1; UNCHANGED in iter-2 and iter-3 (apps/backend/data/loader.py NOT in the iter-3 git diff — confirmed). Single-file {cache}/{safe_symbol}/{timeframe}.parquet; per-day helpers + day loop removed; covering-cache zero Binance calls; atomic os.replace. iter-3 test_determinism.py 6/6 (re-run by evaluator) re-corroborates the warm-cache/determinism foundation still holds.

anti_goal_violations.anti_goal: BACKTEST_STORE_DIR (session/run history) MUST NOT default to a volatile /tmp path; session and run history MUST survive a process restart.
anti_goal_violations.evidence: RESOLVED in goal-money-billions-iter-1; UNCHANGED in iter-2 and iter-3 (apps/backend/backend/session_store.py NOT in the iter-3 git diff — confirmed). _DEFAULT_STORE_DIR = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[3] / '.data' / 'backtests' (absolute, not under /tmp). iter-3 J-02 lazy-reload of prior runs from the durable store re-corroborates server-side persistence.

anti_goal_violations.anti_goal: GET /api/sessions/{id} (the list/open path) MUST NOT eagerly parse full per-iteration result.json/rating.json payloads; iteration detail is lazy-loaded via the existing per-iteration endpoint.
anti_goal_violations.evidence: RESOLVED in goal-money-billions-iter-3. Evaluator independently verified the FINAL source: apps/backend/backend/session_routes.py get_session (lines 155-181) builds the iteration list via read_iteration_meta(session_id, parts[1]) at line 164 and contains ZERO read_iteration_full calls; read_iteration_full is now used only by the UNCHANGED lazy get_iteration endpoint (line 242). 404 condition (line 172) and response envelope (lines 175-181) behaviorally unchanged. Binding non-vacuous backend test apps/backend/tests/test_session_routes.py: test_get_session_iteration_list_is_lightweight_no_heavy_payloads seeds a node CONTAINING result/rating/insights/prompt/scriptCode then asserts each of (result,rating,insights,prompt,scriptCode,timeframeResults,equity_curve,trades) is absent AND lightweight fields present with exact values; test_get_session_does_not_call_read_iteration_full is an inspect.getsource code-inspection independence proof. Evaluator re-ran: test_session_routes.py 5/5 PASS; full backend suite 124 passed (the lone test_directions_cache.py failure is unrelated, not in the diff, spec-pre-authorized pre-existing). Per lessons.md iter-0 independence rule, resolution rests on code+test, NOT on a green J-02. Cross-layer corroboration: GET /api/sessions/{id} ~115-152 KB lightweight vs a single iteration's lazy detail ~2.6-2.8 MB.
